title: derris costata
intro: Derris costata, also known as the Tendriled Derris, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family, native to tropical Asia. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, containing rotenone, a toxic compound that has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Derris costata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Derris costata can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
